raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The LGBTQ+ community faces unique barriers when navigating the healthcare system, including a lack of access, stigma, and discrimination.",
    "One bad experience in healthcare can lead to individuals not seeking medical care in the future, worsening healthcare outcomes.",
    "Training pharmacists and pharmacy technicians in culturally competent care can improve the healthcare experience for LGBTQ+ individuals.",
    "AB 2194 will help ensure that pharmacists and pharmacy technicians can provide culturally competent care for the estimated 2.6 million people identifying as LGBTQ+ in California.",
    "According to the California Department of Health, 220,000 adults in California identify as trans, transgender, or non-binary.",
    "AB 2914 provides a pathway for healthcare providers to learn appropriate and empathetic communication skills specifically to serve the LGBTQ+ community."
  ]
}
```
